word: wer nie sein Brot im Bette aß, weiß nicht, wie Krümel piken

senses.gloss: man muss etwas erfahren, um zu wissen, was es bedeutet
senses.gloss_en: you don't know what it's like until you've experienced it
senses.gloss_en_full: you must experience something to truly understand what it means

sounds.ipa: [veːɐ̯ ˈniː zaɪ̯n bʁoːt ɪm ˈbɛtə aːs vaɪ̯s ˈnɪçt viː ˈkʁyːml̩ ˈpiːkn̩]
